name: research-plugin
description: Lean Codex research-state workflow with project-local MCP context, resources, reviews, and Modal SSH sandboxes.

interface.shortDescription: Project-scoped claims, experiments, resources, reviews, and Modal sandboxes
interface.longDescription: A lean research-state plug-in where Codex operates through skills and a project-local MCP proxy. A shared HTTP daemon controls durable memory, permissioned mutations, repo-file resources, workflow state, adversarial review records, and Modal sandbox provisioning. Agents use project.current for folder context and sandbox.sync before associating remote results.
defaultPrompt: Use Research Plugin. Start with project.current, then workflow.status_and_next.
Use Research Plugin to run this experiment in a sandbox and call sandbox.sync before registering results.
Use Research Plugin to sync resources, review the experiment, and update claims.
